name: Flight Centre Travel Group Limited
analysis: FLT has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$11.8100, stop A$10.1574, target A$14.1259 (1.40:1) — then trail it.
